title: E13-MT076-ImeCompositionInlinePreedit
group: E13 Internationalization / Unicode / input (CJK, Cyrillic, symbols, RTL)
authoring_note: Authored 2026-06-22 by KERNEL_BUILDER (E13 i18n expansion). Closes the MT-012 AC-6 PARTIAL: IME COMMIT works (committed CJK text inserts char-correct) but the in-progress underlined preedit is held as state and NOT painted inline. CJK/Japanese/Korean text entry is impossible to use comfortably without seeing the composition; this MT makes IME input first-class in BOTH editors.

scope.summary:
Goal: make IME (Input Method Editor) composition first-class so Chinese (pinyin/zhuyin), Japanese (romaji/kana), and Korean (Hangul jamo) can be typed and SEEN inline in both the rich-text editor and the code editor. EXPECTED DIFF SHAPE: edit rich_editor/renderer/ime_handler.rs + rich_editor_widget.rs + block_renderer.rs (paint the preedit run); add IME handling to the code editor (code_editor/panel.rs); enable IME at the shell (app.rs set_ime_allowed). Builds on MT-075 (CJK glyphs must exist to render the composition).

WHAT EXISTS (verified): MT-012 wired egui::Event::Ime (Enabled | Preedit(String) | Commit(String) | Disabled) in ime_handler.rs; COMMIT inserts the committed text char-correct, and the double-insert guard (clear preedit region before commit) is proven. GAP: egui 0.33 ImeEvent::Preedit(String) carries NO cursor range, the preedit is overlay-only PreeditState, and block_renderer does NOT paint the underlined in-progress composition inline (MT-012 AC-6 PARTIAL).

WHAT THIS MT ADDS:
1. Paint the in-progress preedit run INLINE at the caret in the rich-text editor: render the PreeditState text as an underlined (dotted/solid underline) inline run at the caret pixel position (via the MT-012 Galley pos_from_cursor), visually distinct (e.g. underline + subtle background), WITHOUT mutating the document model (preedit stays overlay-only - the double-insert guard depends on it). On Commit, clear the overlay and insert via the existing path. On Disabled/cancel (empty Commit or Escape), clear the overlay with no insert.
2. Position the OS IME candidate window at the caret: egui exposes Context::output Mut.ime / the egui-winit bridge uses the widget's IME rect - ensure the editor reports the caret rect so the OS candidate list appears at the caret, not the window origin (ctx.output_mut(|o| o.ime = Some(egui::output::IMEOutput { rect, cursor_rect }))).
3. Enable IME at the shell: app.rs / eframe setup must call set_ime_allowed(true) on the window (documented as the shell contract in ime_handler.rs) so winit forwards IME events. Wire it (coordinate with E11/MT-069 host-mount; if the window handle is only available at host-mount, land the call there and reference it here - typed note, not a silent gap).
4. Bring the code editor (code_editor/panel.rs) to the same IME behavior (its input handler currently does plain Event::Text; add Event::Ime preedit+commit so CJK works in code too).

Grapheme correctness: the committed text + preedit may contain multi-codepoint graphemes (CJK is mostly 1 codepoint/glyph, but Korean can compose); insert via the MT-011 char-indexed rope (already proven char-correct by the emoji test). Caret after commit lands after the committed run.
acceptance_criteria: AC1: Feeding a Preedit('ni') then Preedit('nihao') then Commit('你好') event sequence to the rich-text editor inserts ONLY '你好' into the document (no preedit chars left in the rope), proven by a cargo test (extends the MT-012 double-insert guard with the new paint path).

AC2: While composing (PreeditState non-empty), a kittest screenshot shows the preedit text rendered INLINE at the caret with an UNDERLINE decoration (visually distinct from committed text) - the MT-012 AC-6 visual half now satisfied; verified by pixel/visual inspection (CJK glyphs render thanks to MT-075).
AC3: Escape / empty-Commit during composition clears the preedit overlay with NO insertion (cancel path) - cargo test.

AC4: The editor reports an IME caret rect via ctx.output_mut(...).ime so the OS candidate window anchors at the caret - asserted by inspecting the egui output IMEOutput in a kittest (rect matches the caret region, not origin).

AC5: The CODE editor (code_editor/panel.rs) handles the same Preedit/Commit sequence - a CJK string composes + commits into a code buffer (cargo test feeding Event::Ime through the code input handler).

AC6: set_ime_allowed(true) is wired at the shell (app.rs or the E11 host-mount it references) so winit forwards IME events; a grep/test confirms the call exists (or a typed BLOCKER names the exact host-mount step if the window handle is only available there).
AC7: AccessKit - the composing editor exposes its text + selection so a screen reader/agent can observe composition state (reuse the existing editor AccessKit nodes; no new tree).
AC8: No regression - full crate test suite green (this touches shared rich_editor_widget/block_renderer/input paths).
proof_targets: PROOF1: cargo test -p handshake-native ime_composition -- --nocapture: Preedit->Commit insert-only-commit (AC1), cancel clears (AC3), code-editor IME (AC5), IMEOutput rect (AC4).
PROOF2: egui_kittest screenshot -> EXTERNAL Handshake_Artifacts/handshake-test/wp-kernel-012-mt-076/mt076_ime_preedit.png showing the underlined inline CJK preedit at the caret; visually inspected.
PROOF4: cargo test -p handshake-native (FULL suite) = 0 failures.
implementation_notes: RESEARCH BASIS: egui IME = ctx.output_mut(|o| o.ime = Some(IMEOutput{rect, cursor_rect})) to position the OS candidate window; consume egui::Event::Ime (NOT raw winit - the egui-winit bridge already surfaces it, per MT-012). winit's set_ime_allowed gates whether the OS sends composition events. The preedit-underline is a RENDER overlay (egui Galley + a painter underline line_segment), not a model mutation - this preserves MT-012's double-insert guard (preedit lives only in PreeditState).
DO NOT mutate the document model with preedit text - render it as an overlay. Commit is the only path that inserts (existing, proven). This is the load-bearing correctness invariant from MT-012.

Code editor: code_editor/panel.rs already has the live-typing/keymap loop (MT-010); add an Event::Ime arm that drives the CursorSet insert on Commit + a preedit overlay paint in the code painter (mirror the rich-editor approach).

set_ime_allowed: the window handle lives in the eframe/app bootstrap; if it is only reachable at the E11 host-mount (MT-069), land the call there and leave a typed reference here (carry-forward note), do NOT ship a silent no-op.

ARTIFACT HYGIENE (CX-212E): screenshot to the EXTERNAL wp-kernel-012-mt-076 root + assert_no_local_artifact_dir(); no repo-local tests/screenshots/. Cargo artifact-root env hotfix. FULL-suite gate (shared widgets touched).

NO PERPETUAL REPAINT: a blinking composition caret/underline must follow the MT-012 focus-guarded blink (request_repaint_after only while focused), never an unconditional per-frame repaint (MT-015 lesson).

MT-079 MOUNT CONTEXT + LOAD-BEARING STEERS (KERNEL_BUILDER gate 2026-06-26): set_ime_allowed(true) - the window handle IS now reachable: MT-079 host-mounted the editors in app.rs + established app.rs edits in-scope, so wire set_ime_allowed in the app.rs eframe/window bootstrap (AC6/RISK-3/MC-3 - NOT a typed blocker anymore; the window exists). LOAD-BEARING INVARIANT (RISK-1/MC-1, AC1 - the MT-012 double-insert bug): the preedit is OVERLAY-ONLY (PreeditState) - paint it as an underlined inline run at the caret (Galley pos_from_cursor) WITHOUT mutating the document model/rope; ONLY Commit inserts (via the existing proven char-indexed MT-011 path); Escape/empty-Commit clears the overlay with NO insert (AC3). Report the IMEOutput caret rect (ctx.output_mut(|o| o.ime=Some(IMEOutput{rect,cursor_rect}))) so the OS candidate window anchors at the caret not origin (RISK-2/MC-2, AC4). CODE editor (panel.rs) gets the same Event::Ime preedit+commit arm (AC5). FOCUS-GUARDED BLINK (RISK-4/MC-4, the MT-015 lesson): any composition caret/underline blink uses request_repaint_after ONLY while focused - NEVER an unconditional per-frame repaint. CJK preedit renders via the MT-075 font chain (done). FULL-SUITE no-regression (AC8/PROOF4): the -j2 suite has a KNOWN PRE-EXISTING wgpu flake (3 bins 0xc0000005: code_editor_panel/diff_editor_panel/embeds + 2 timing races e7_swarm/swarm_concurrency) - run those in ISOLATION to prove no IME regression (NOT a new failure). external screenshot mt076_ime_preedit.png (underlined inline CJK preedit at caret); no Color32 literal (theme); clippy clean.
ports_from_react: No direct React port - the browser handled IME natively for the webview. app/src rich/code editors relied on the DOM's contenteditable/textarea IME; the native app must drive egui IME itself.
binds_backend_api: None - IME is pure frontend input.

risks: RISK-1: Painting the preedit accidentally inserts it into the rope (double-insert) - the exact MT-012 bug. Mitigation: preedit is overlay-only; AC1 + the existing guard test.
RISK-2: Candidate window appears at the window origin (not the caret) because the IME rect is not reported - unusable CJK input. Mitigation: AC4 IMEOutput rect.
RISK-3: set_ime_allowed never called -> the OS sends no composition events -> IME silently dead. Mitigation: AC6 explicit wiring or typed blocker.
RISK-4: Composition caret blink repaints every frame (idle CPU / harness.run max_steps - the MT-015 class). Mitigation: focus-guarded blink only.
RISK-5: Korean jamo composition produces combining sequences that the char-indexed rope mis-counts. Mitigation: insert via the proven char-indexed path; AC1 covers a multi-codepoint commit.
minimum_controls: MC-1: preedit overlay-only (no model mutation) - AC1.
MC-2: IME caret rect reported - AC4.
MC-3: set_ime_allowed wired or typed blocker - AC6.
MC-4: focus-guarded blink (no perpetual repaint) - implementation note + full-suite gate.

sources_to_check: egui examples for IME / CJK input
research_basis.selected_approach: Paint preedit as an inline underlined overlay (no model mutation); report IMEOutput caret rect; enable set_ime_allowed; mirror in the code editor; commit via the existing char-indexed insert.
rejected: mutating the model with preedit text (re-introduces double-insert)
raw winit IME handling (egui already surfaces Event::Ime)
research_basis.risks_mitigations: double-insert -> overlay-only; wrong candidate position -> IMEOutput rect; dead IME -> set_ime_allowed; perpetual repaint -> focus-guarded blink.
research_basis.validation_plan: Preedit->Commit insert-only test in both editors + underlined-preedit screenshot + IMEOutput rect assertion + full-suite no-regression.

research_provenance.source: KERNEL_BUILDER gate (my MT-076 contract) + MT-012 ime_handler.rs (commit+double-insert guard) + MT-075 CJK glyphs + MT-079 app.rs mount + egui IMEOutput
corrections: set_ime_allowed wireable in app.rs NOW (MT-079 mounted the window/editors) - not a blocker
overlay-only preedit (no model mutation - the MT-012 double-insert invariant); underlined inline at caret; only Commit inserts char-correct; Escape clears
IMEOutput caret rect (candidate window at caret); code editor same Ime arm; focus-guarded blink (no perpetual repaint, MT-015 lesson)
full-suite no-regression w/ known wgpu-flake isolation; external screenshot; no Color32; clippy clean

implementation_result.implemented_by: KERNEL_BUILDER folded pipeline wf_4a27fb5e (impl + 3-lens panel; ALL PASS - no harden)
commits: 56a5d405 feat MT-076 IME composition inline preedit in both editors
implementation_result.review_panel: correctness=PASS(0), backend-shape=PASS(0), perf-focus-hygiene=PASS(0) -> ALL PASS, zero must-fixes (11th clean all-PASS MT).
implementation_result.proofs: AC1..8 + PROOF1..4 PASS; 11 IME tests + 1504 lib + FULL suite green in ONE run (136 binary results ok, 0 FAILED - even the known wgpu-flake bins passed) + clippy clean; IME inline preedit (Hi你好世界: Hi committed + 你好世界 underlined composing CJK real glyphs at caret) visually verified - MT-012 AC-6 visual half satisfied; screenshot EXTERNAL.
implementation_result.steers_held: OVERLAY-ONLY preedit (the MT-012 double-insert invariant HELD): rope UNCHANGED while composing, ONLY Commit inserts char-correct (caret +2 CHARS not bytes); empty-Commit + ImeEvent::Disabled clear overlay no-insert. Underlined inline preedit at caret (Galley pos_from_cursor) + tinted bg, distinct from committed. IMEOutput caret rect [[22.6,59]-[60.5,77]] anchored at caret not origin. CODE editor same Event::Ime arm (composes x -> commits x你好). set_ime_allowed WIRED in app.rs (ViewportCommand::IMEAllowed(true) on first frame, live+grep - MT-079 mounted the window, not a blocker). AccessKit composition value in both editors. focus-guarded blink (no perpetual repaint). CJK renders via MT-075 chain.
implementation_result.waiver_granted: app.rs (set_ime_allowed) + code_editor/panel.rs (Ime arm) + rich_editor/renderer/{block_renderer,ime_handler,rich_editor_widget}.rs (preedit paint) + test in allowed_paths.
